meta.rank_math_title: Phone Mast Removal & Site Redevelopment Advice | UK Experts
meta.rank_math_description: Need to remove a phone mast for redevelopment? We provide expert advice on mast termination, site relocation, and navigating your legal rights under the UK Electronic Communications Code (ECC).

content.rendered:
[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ fullwidth=”on” admin_label=”Hero Section” _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_fullwidth_header title=”Phone Mast Sales – Sell Your Telecom Lease or Site” button_one_text=”Enquire Now” button_one_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjYxIn19@” _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _dynamic_attributes=”button_one_url” button_one_text_color_hover=”#edbb5f” button_two_text_color_hover=”#edbb5f” button_one_bg_color_hover=”rgba(0,0,0,0)” button_two_bg_color_hover=”rgba(0,0,0,0)” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Unlock the Value of Your Phone Mast

[/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Maximise the sale value of your Phone Mast lease or telecom site.

Whether you’re considering a leasehold or freehold sale, our specialist Phone Mast Sales Service helps UK landowners achieve the best possible price and terms from telecom lease transactions – with clarity, support, and expert negotiation every step of the way.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

What Is a Phone Mast Sale?

A Phone Mast sale involves transferring ownership or rights associated with a telecom lease to a third party. This can include:

• Assignment of the lease to an investor or operator
• Sale of a portfolio of sites
• Sale of income streams generated from rental agreements

Telecom leases are specialised assets with significant value, but achieving the best outcome requires industry insight, market knowledge, and negotiation experience.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Why Specialist Advice Matters in Mast Sales

Operators and buyers approach telecom assets with commercial priorities that may not align with the landowner’s goals. Without specialist support, landlords risk:

• Accepting lowball offers
• Overlooking hidden contractual value
• Misunderstanding tax or legal implications
• Accepting unfavourable assignment conditions

We protect your interests from valuation through completion so you maximise financial return and minimise risk.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

How Our Mast Sales Service Works

Effortless Lease Monetisation

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Asset Valuation & Strategy” badge=”1″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

We begin with a detailed valuation of your site or lease based on:

• Lease terms and rent history
• Operator commitment and network importance
• Comparable UK sales and market dynamics
• Renewal and rent review opportunities
• ECC effect on lease value

This gives you a clear view of what your asset is worth, not just what someone thinks it might be worth.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Buyer Identification & Marketing” badge=”2″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

We confidentially introduce your asset to:

• Institutional investors
• Telecom-specialist buyers
• Portfolio purchasers
• Operators seeking new capacity or coverage

Our goal is to create competition — multiple interested buyers drive better pricing.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Deal Negotiation” badge=”3″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

We handle negotiation on your behalf to secure:

• Optimal sale price
• Favourable assignment conditions
• Strong contractual protections
• Clear timelines and milestones

You stay informed and in control at every step.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Completion Support” badge=”4″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

Once terms are agreed, we continue to support you through:

• Legal review coordination
• Assignment documentation
• Final transfer and closing
• Post-completion compliance

This ensures a smooth, professional sale from start to finish.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Ready to Sell or Evaluate Your Telecom Asset?

If you’re considering selling a Phone Mast lease or portfolio, act now to understand its true market value and maximise your return.

8 Essential Tips to Maximise Your Phone Mast Income

The Fort Offices, Artillery Business Park, Oswestry, SY11 4AD

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Why Choose The Phone Mast Advice Company Ltd

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

We specialise in telecom property transactions and represent landlords only – never operators or buyers. With decades of UK market experience, we help you sell with confidence, accuracy, and financial clarity.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _dynamic_attributes=”content” _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF90aXRsZSIsInNldHRpbmdzIjp7ImJlZm9yZSI6IjxoMj5Db21wcmVoZW5zaXZlICIsImFmdGVyIjoiIE92ZXJ2aWV3PC9oMj4ifX0=@[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Mobile Phone Mast leases are valuable assets for which investors will pay large sums to acquire the freehold or leasehold of the land on which an operator’s mobile Phone Mast is located. In most cases, the landlord only needs to sell a leasehold interest in the site, not the freehold. The investor then owns the income stream and is responsible for the ongoing estate management.

Due to the current uncertainty in the telecoms market, many landlords are choosing to swap their annual rent for a lump sum. This way, they do not have to deal with an impending lease renewal, and they can re-invest the capital however they see fit. This option provides security, as the lump sum is non-returnable, regardless of whether the rent falls significantly in the future or whether the mast even remains.

Network operators will sometimes pay a premium lease payment to landowners to secure the right to build, run and maintain a Phone Mast on land or property. Third party investors who are not network operators will also purchase mast leases for the income stream and investment values.

Ultimately, there are many factors to consider when deciding to sell the Phone Mast lease on your property, which will depend greatly on your individual circumstances and priorities. It is a decision that should be carefully considered and ideally made with help of a professional advisor.

The Phone Mast Advice Company Ltd can provide an excellent agency service and market your sites to all credible investors in the marketplace and can achieve the best premium lease payment and contractual terms for your Phone Mast lease sale.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Important points:

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

• The investor or operator purchasing the mast will deal with any ongoing lease renewal or lease negotiations, which avoids the risk of litigation

• The third-party investor will be focused on keeping the rent as high as possible so when the lease term ends the chances of your Phone Mast lease coming back to you on a higher rent can increase

• Most credible third-party investors will have a well-organised estates management department that will deal with access requests, upgrades, and ongoing estate management issues which reduces the hassle or burden for the land or property owner

• You receive a large lump sum payment which you won’t need to return if the network operator removes the mast

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Real Example: Mast Sale in Rural Kent

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

A landowner in Kent sold the lease on a Vodafone mast for £95,000. The mast had been generating £4,000/year. With the lease nearing renewal and rents expected to drop, they opted for the lump sum and reinvested the funds in new agricultural equipment—completely avoiding future negotiation risks.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Ready to Capitalise on Your Telecom Lease?

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

If you have a mobile Phone Mast on your land and want to unlock its value, speak to one of our telecom lease advisors today. We’ll provide a free, no-obligation valuation and walk you through the next steps to secure the best offer.

Contact us now to begin your mast lease valuation and sales process.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ disabled_on=”on|on|on” module_id=”form” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-a5e01c3a-717f-40df-b5f2-b1ba08b21a19″ disabled=”on” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-a5e01c3a-717f-40df-b5f2-b1ba08b21a19%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9″ custom_padding=”2em|2em|2em|2em|true|true” box_shadow_style=”preset1″ box_shadow_color=”rgba(0,0,0,0.1)” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

Get In Touch

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][et_pb_code _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Beyond core lease advice, we offer a range of specialised services to protect your rights, maximise income, and simplify complex telecom landlord issues. Whether your needs are technical, legal, financial, or strategic, our expert team delivers results you can trust.

[/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

What Are “Other Services”?

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

“Other Services” includes additional, specialised support that doesn’t fall under standard rent reviews, renewals, or new lettings – but still matters for landlords with telecom installations. These services help you:

• Resolve disputes
• Understand technical obligations
• Optimise lease value
• Protect against operator overreach
• Navigate complex legal or commercial situations

Each service is designed to deliver clarity, protection, and financial value.

meta.rank_math_description: From access disputes to site upgrades and equipment alterations, we provide specialist advice for all other phone mast issues affecting UK site providers and commercial property owners.

[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ fullwidth=”on” admin_label=”Hero Section” _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_fullwidth_header title=”New Lettings – Phone Mast & Telecom Site Agreements” button_one_text=”Enquire Now” button_one_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjYxIn19@” _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _dynamic_attributes=”button_one_url” button_one_text_color_hover=”#edbb5f” button_two_text_color_hover=”#edbb5f” button_one_bg_color_hover=”rgba(0,0,0,0)” button_two_bg_color_hover=”rgba(0,0,0,0)” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Unlock Value from Your Land

[/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” min_height=”156px” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Secure the right telecom lease from day one.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

When a telecom operator wants to place a Phone Mast, antenna, or other communications equipment on your land, the lease you agree initially determines your income, rights, and protections for years to come. We help UK landowners negotiate fair, landlord-focused new lettings agreements that maximise value and protect your interests.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

What Is a New Letting?

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

A new letting is a property lease arrangement between a landowner and a telecom operator that permits installation and use of communications equipment on your site. This could include:

• Mobile phone masts
• Rooftop antennae
• Small cells or other wireless infrastructure

Unlike established leases, new lettings require negotiation before the lease terms are finalised. Getting this right at the start protects your rights and optimises rental income.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Understanding the Electronic Communications Code

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

The Electronic Communications Code (ECC) is a legal framework governing telecoms operators’ rights to access land for infrastructure. Updated by the Digital Economy Act 2017, the ECC significantly increased operators’ powers while reducing the leverage of landowners during negotiations. Once a mast is installed, it can be difficult and costly to remove—even after the lease ends.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Why Specialist Advice Matters for New Lettings

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Operators typically provide standard Heads of Terms that favour their business model, not necessarily your interests as a landlord. Without professional input, the lease you accept may:

• Deliver below-market rent
• Contain weak protections
• Grant excessive rights of access
• Reduce future redevelopment flexibility
• Fail to account for changing technology

Expert negotiation ensures you start with a lease that is fair, robust, and future-proof.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

How Rent Is Calculated: Compensation vs. Consideration

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

One of the most important changes under the updated Code is how payments are determined:

  • Compensation: For any loss or damage caused by the operator’s presence.
  • Consideration: Based on the value of the land itself, excluding any value derived from the telecoms use.

This often results in dramatically lower rental offers, especially on agricultural or low-value land. Landowners accustomed to market-value-based rents are frequently surprised by the new valuations.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

How Our New Lettings Service Works

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=” Initial Site Review” badge=”1″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Market Rent Benchmarking” badge=”2″ blurb_icon=”||fa||400″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

Using our extensive UK telecom rent database, we establish a fair market rent range that reflects:

• Site location and visibility
• Telecom demand and network value
• Comparable UK agreements

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Heads of Terms Negotiation” badge=”3″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

We negotiate key terms with the operator, focusing on:

• Rent and payment structure
• Access and maintenance rights
• Duration and break rights
• Equipment removal and reinstatement
• Insurance and liability provisions

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Contract Finalisation” badge=”4″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

We work with your solicitor to ensure the final lease protects your rights, reflects agreed terms, and fits your long-term goals.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Ready to Get the Best Telecom Lease?

A new letting is one of the most important decisions you’ll make with your site. It establishes your income and rights for years, possibly decades. Don’t accept operator terms without expert input.

Why Choose The Phone Mast Advice Company Ltd

We represent landlords only – never operators. Our specialist telecom property advice has helped UK landowners secure better rent, stronger leases, and fair terms for new installations. With decades of telecom negotiation experience, we protect your rights and income from day one.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _dynamic_attributes=”content” _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF90aXRsZSIsInNldHRpbmdzIjp7ImJlZm9yZSI6IjxoMj5Db21wcmVoZW5zaXZlICIsImFmdGVyIjoiIE92ZXJ2aWV3PC9oMj4ifX0=@[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]The Digital Economy Act 2017 and the resulting changes to the Electronic Communications Code enhance the rights operators already benefited from under previous legislation.

If you have been approached about a new Phone Mast, you need to be aware that once on site, it is not often easy to remove a telecoms operator, so you need to carefully consider whether or not you may need the land or roof space back for your own use in the future. Legislation often allows them to remain on site, despite any contractual agreement ending and therefore it can be costly and time consuming to remove them. We would strongly advise not to let mobile phone operators on your land or property until you have sought professional advice.

One of the most significant changes made by the Digital Economy Act 2017 was to the mechanism by which payment is calculated in absence of consensual agreement by both parties. Under previous legislation, rent was determined by market value (i.e. the rent paid for similar masts in the area). Now, payment is split into two parts: Compensation and Consideration. This can either be paid as a lump sum or can be an annual payment.

Operators are calculating compensation by valuing the land or roof space, disregarding the Phone Mast. On an agricultural field, this can produce a very low figure and many landlords negotiating agreements after the passing of the Digital Economy Act have been shocked by the figures proposed by the operators.

Give us a call and we can chat through their proposal, discuss the pros and cons and if you decide to allow a lease, we can ensure you secure the best contract possible through sensible negotiation. We have acted on thousands of lease renewals over the years and know exactly how to structure an agreement to ensure it protects your interests.[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ disabled_on=”on|on|on” module_id=”form” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-a5e01c3a-717f-40df-b5f2-b1ba08b21a19″ disabled=”on” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-a5e01c3a-717f-40df-b5f2-b1ba08b21a19%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9″ custom_padding=”2em|2em|2em|2em|true|true” box_shadow_style=”preset1″ box_shadow_color=”rgba(0,0,0,0.1)” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

meta.rank_math_description: Considering a new Phone Mast lease on your land? We advise UK landlords on new mast lettings, ensuring fair rent and strong lease terms with operators like Vodafone, O2, EE, and Three.
meta.rank_math_focus_keyword: Phone Mast Lease, New Phone Mast Lease, Phone Mast on My Land

Maximise the Value of Your Phone Mast Lease

Have your Phone Mast lease renewed for the best possible terms.

If your current lease has expired or your operator has approached you with Heads of Terms, we can help you negotiate rent, protect your rights, and secure fair lease terms – even under the Electronic Communications Code.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”#12557B” custom_padding=”5vh|2vw|5vh|2vw|true|true” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”bd440461-a47f-4b44-986d-3dba84282a26″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

What Is a Phone Mast Lease Renewal?

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” text_orientation=”center” background_layout=”dark”]

A lease renewal happens when your existing Phone Mast agreement comes to an end and the telecom operator wants to put a new lease in place.

Under the UK’s Electronic Communications Code (ECC), operators can serve Heads of Terms for a new agreement, but these terms often:

• Offer lower rent than market value
• Use operator-friendly clauses
• Reduce landlord protections

Professional advice ensures you don’t accept terms that leave money or rights on the table.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

Can You Negotiate a Better Lease?

Yes – even under the ECC.
Operators often propose terms that benefit themselves, not landlords. With expert support, you can:

How Our Lease Renewal Service Works

We partner with you through every step of the renewal process.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=” Initial Lease Review” badge=”1″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ custom_css_free_form=”/* Unified Fix for Audit Lists and Closing Text */||.custom-audit-list {|| list-style-position: outside !important;|| padding-left: 25px !important; || margin-top: 10px !important;|| margin-bottom: 15px !important;||}||||.custom-audit-list li {|| letter-spacing: 0px !important;|| line-height: 1.6em !important;|| margin-bottom: 10px !important;|| text-align: left !important;|| list-style-type: disc !important;||}||||.custom-closing-text {|| letter-spacing: 0px !important;|| line-height: 1.6em !important;|| text-align: left !important;|| margin-top: 15px !important;||}” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

We assess:

  • Your current contract
  • Any Heads of Terms offered
  • Key rights and obligations

This ensures we start negotiations from a strong, informed position.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Market & Legal Advice” badge=”2″ blurb_icon=”w||divi||400″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ custom_css_free_form=”/* Professional List Formatting for Service Deliverables */||.custom-audit-list {|| list-style-position: outside !important;|| padding-left: 25px !important; || margin-top: 10px !important;|| margin-bottom: 20px !important;||}||||.custom-audit-list li {|| letter-spacing: 0px !important; /* Fixes wide letter spacing */|| line-height: 1.6em !important;|| margin-bottom: 12px !important;|| text-align: left !important;|| list-style-type: disc !important;||}” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

You receive:

  • Clear guidance on rent benchmarks
  • Explanation of legal frameworks like the ECC
  • Strategy on what terms to accept, challenge, or change

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Negotiation with the Operator” badge=”3″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ custom_css_free_form=”/* Final Service Section Formatting */||.custom-audit-list {|| list-style-position: outside !important;|| padding-left: 25px !important; || margin-top: 10px !important;|| margin-bottom: 15px !important;||}||||.custom-audit-list li {|| letter-spacing: 0px !important;|| line-height: 1.6em !important;|| margin-bottom: 10px !important;|| text-align: left !important;|| list-style-type: disc !important;||}||||.custom-closing-text {|| letter-spacing: 0px !important;|| line-height: 1.6em !important;|| text-align: left !important;|| margin-top: 15px !important;|| font-style: italic; /* Adds a bit of emphasis to your mission statement */||}” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

We handle:

  • Communications with operator agents
  • Rent proposals
  • Clause revisions

Our goal: terms that protect your interests, not just conclude a deal.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Completion with Your Solicitor” badge=”4″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ custom_css_free_form=”/* Fix for Final Professional Paragraphs */||.custom-closing-text {|| letter-spacing: 0px !important;|| line-height: 1.7em !important;|| text-align: left !important;|| margin-top: 20px !important;|| font-weight: 400; /* Clean, professional weight */|| color: inherit;||}” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

We work alongside your solicitor to finalise the lease, from drafting to signature, making sure your interests are protected through to the end.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

Why Renew a Lease?

Landowners benefit from:

• Continued rental income
• Protection of land value
• Structured terms that reflect modern telecom use
• Greater control over access and maintenance
• Improved legal clarity around operator rights and responsibilities

Without expert advice, operators may push terms that suit their interests, not yours.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

Key Questions We Help You Answer

What rent should I accept?

We benchmark your site against comparable deals to ensure you’re fairly compensated.

Can I refuse renewal?
In some situations, yes – but the options depend on your lease and local law. We explain your choices.

What rights do I have under the ECC?
The Code affects how rent is calculated and what terms apply. We break this down in plain English.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

Ready to Maximise Your Lease Renewal?

If you’ve received an offer from an operator, or your lease has expired, now is the time to act.
Contact us today for a free initial assessment and make sure your Phone Mast lease renewal gets the best possible terms – not the easiest ones.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Phone number” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”213d8aa5-4cb9-4946-a873-4354ecb66e0a” link_option_url=”Tel:+442038830605″ icon_font_size=”24px” use_circle=”on” circle_color=”#edbb5f” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22image_icon_background_color%22,%22image_icon_background_color%22%93}”]

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _dynamic_attributes=”content” _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF90aXRsZSIsInNldHRpbmdzIjp7ImJlZm9yZSI6IjxoMj5Db21wcmVoZW5zaXZlICIsImFmdGVyIjoiIE92ZXJ2aWV3PC9oMj4ifX0=@[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default”]

The Digital Economy Act 2017, gave operators more power to force new Phone Mast lease agreements with lower rents on Landlords.

We can help you navigate the complex legal and financial issues that are likely to arise during lease renewal negotiations. We provide expert advice on market rents, lease terms, and legal considerations, and can help you negotiate a fair and reasonable agreement with the operator.

The Phone Mast Advice Company Ltd is one of the UK’s leading specialist agents, who provide advice on contract terms for Phone Mast leases and licence agreements.

If your lease has expired or the operator has contacted you and issued Heads of Terms for a new agreement, contact us today to find out how we can get you the best new lease and highest rental possible for your Phone Mast agreement.

We can review your previous Phone Mast contract and give a basic free consultation on the best way forward.

 

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

Important reasons for renewing a lease

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default”]

For landowners, Phone Mast leases can provide a steady source of income and can be a way to make use of unused or underutilised land.

Phone Mast lease agreements typically include terms such as the amount of rent to be paid, the duration of the lease, and any conditions or restrictions on the use of the land. The lease agreement may also address issues such as maintenance, insurance, and access to the site.

Phone Mast leases are important for telecommunications companies to expand and improve their network coverage, as they need to have a physical presence in different areas to provide reliable service to their customers.

Unfortunately, telecommunications companies often seek to negotiate lower rents with landlords for the installation and operation of phone masts on their properties.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _dynamic_attributes=”content” _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ locked=”off”]@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF90aXRsZSIsInNldHRpbmdzIjp7ImJlZm9yZSI6IjxoMj5XaHkgTGVhc2UgUmVuZXdhbCBNYXR0ZXJzPC9oMj4iLCJhZnRlciI6IiJ9fQ==@[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” locked=”off”]

Phone Mast leases are long-term income-generating agreements that require careful negotiation to reflect current market conditions and regulatory frameworks.

Since the introduction of the Digital Economy Act in 2017, telecoms operators have gained greater power to impose lease terms under the ECC. This shift often leads to rent reduction proposals and diminished landowner rights.

We help landowners push back against unfavourable terms and secure a commercially sound agreement.

 

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

Example Scenario

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default”]

A landowner in Yorkshire was offered a 60% rent reduction under the ECC. After our intervention, the rent was renegotiated to just a 10% reduction, with added development flexibility and updated maintenance terms.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

Get a Free Lease Review

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default”]

If your lease has expired or the operator has issued new Heads of Terms, contact us today. We offer a free initial consultation to assess your position and recommend the best next steps.

Phone Mast Advice Company – Trusted specialists in telecom lease negotiation

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ admin_label=”Features” _builder_version=”4.22.2″ background_color=”gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5″ custom_padding=”100px|0px|0px|0px||” global_module=”279829″ saved_tabs=”all” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ locked=”off”]

Common Questions About Additional Services

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_accordion _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6b8dd53a-3d47-4a78-9892-ff860c628284″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_accordion_item title=”Do you handle disputes with operators?” open=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Yes, we provide negotiation support and strategic guidance to resolve disagreements efficiently and protect your rights.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”Can you help me understand difficult lease clauses?” _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

Absolutely, we break down complex language into clear advice so you know what your contract really says.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”Do you provide valuations for portfolios?” _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

Yes, we offer tailored valuations and analyses for individual sites or entire telecom portfolios.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”What if I have incomplete documentation?” _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

We assist with documentation organisation, lease retrieval, and record clarification so nothing is missed.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

Why Choose Us

We are one of the UK’s leading specialists in Phone Mast lease renewals with:
• Specialist negotiation experience
• Deep knowledge of telecom operator behaviour
• Clear, landlord-first advice

Whether you’re a single-site owner or handle a portfolio, we give you confidence, clarity, and results.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ disabled_on=”on|on|on” module_id=”form” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-a5e01c3a-717f-40df-b5f2-b1ba08b21a19″ disabled=”on” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-a5e01c3a-717f-40df-b5f2-b1ba08b21a19%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9″ custom_padding=”2em|2em|2em|2em|true|true” box_shadow_style=”preset1″ box_shadow_color=”rgba(0,0,0,0.1)” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ fullwidth=”on” admin_label=”Hero Section” _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_fullwidth_header title=”Phone Mast Rent Reviews – Maximise Your Rental Income” button_one_text=”Enquire Now” button_one_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjYxIn19@” _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _dynamic_attributes=”button_one_url” button_one_text_color_hover=”#edbb5f” button_two_text_color_hover=”#edbb5f” button_one_bg_color_hover=”rgba(0,0,0,0)” button_two_bg_color_hover=”rgba(0,0,0,0)”]

Ensure your Phone Mast rent reflects the current market and the value of your land.
If your telecom lease includes a rent review clause, you could be entitled to significantly more rent, sometimes including backdated payments. We help UK landowners secure fair rent, enforce missed reviews, and protect your rights under the Electronic Communications Code (ECC).

[/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

What Is a Phone Mast Rent Review?

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default”]

A Phone Mast rent review is a formal reassessment of the rent you receive under your telecom lease. Typically triggered every 3–5 years (or as specified in your lease), the review ensures your rent:

• Reflects current market rates
• Accounts for technological or operator changes
• Maximises income for the duration of the lease

Operators sometimes propose reduced rents or try to avoid paying increases, expert advice ensures your rent reflects your land’s true value.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

Why You Need Expert Rent Review Advice

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default”]

Without specialist support, landlords risk:

• Accepting below-market rent offers
• Losing out on backdated increases
• Missing opportunities under the Electronic Communications Code
• Accepting unfavourable lease adjustments

We guide you to enforce fair rent increases, avoid legal pitfalls, and protect long-term revenue from your telecom lease.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

How Our Rent Review Service Works

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Lease Assessment” badge=”1″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

We review your current lease to determine:

• Rent review clauses
• Expired or upcoming review dates
• Opportunities for backdated rent increases

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Market Benchmarking” badge=”2″ blurb_icon=”h||divi||400″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

We compare your site with similar telecom agreements across the UK to establish fair market rent.
This ensures you get accurate, defensible rent proposals.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Negotiation with Operators” badge=”3″ blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”]

We handle communication and negotiation with the operator, including:

• Rent proposals
• Rent review disputes
• Formal valuation processes

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

Key Benefits of Our Rent Review Service

content.rendered:
[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ fullwidth=”on” admin_label=”Hero Section” _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_fullwidth_header title=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF90aXRsZSIsInNldHRpbmdzIjp7ImJlZm9yZSI6IjxoMT4iLCJhZnRlciI6IjwvaDE+In19@” subhead=”Frequently Asked Questions” _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _dynamic_attributes=”title” subhead_font=”|600|||||||” button_one_text_color_hover=”#edbb5f” button_two_text_color_hover=”#edbb5f” button_one_bg_color_hover=”rgba(0,0,0,0)” button_two_bg_color_hover=”rgba(0,0,0,0)” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]Get answers to common questions about Phone Mast rents and leases in the UK. Our FAQ page provides valuable insights into the lease negotiation process, rent reviews, and much more. Discover the key factors to consider before entering into a Phone Mast lease agreement and ensure that you make informed decisions.[/et_pb_text][et_pb_accordion _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”6b8dd53a-3d47-4a78-9892-ff860c628284″ hover_enabled=”0″ global_colors_info=”{}” sticky_enabled=”0″][et_pb_accordion_item title=”How much is my mobile phone mast worth?” _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”on”]The value of a mobile Phone Mast can vary widely depending on various factors such as location, size and type, as well as the demand for mobile coverage in the area. To get an accurate estimate of the value of your mobile Phone Mast, you need to consult with a professional agent or a company such as a Phone Mast advice company that specialises in the sale and lease of mobile phone masts. They will be able to assess your specific mast and provide you with a detailed assessment based on market conditions and other relevant factors. Additionally, the value of a mobile Phone Mast can also be influenced by the terms of any existing leases or agreements with mobile operators, as well as any local planning regulations and government legislation in your area. Therefore, it’s essential to consider all of these factors when determining the value of your mobile Phone Mast.[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”What is a mobile phone mast lease premium?” _builder_version=”4.24.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

A mobile Phone Mast lease premium is a lump sum payment made by a mobile network operator or third party investor to a landowner or mast owner for the right to install a mobile Phone Mast on their property or mast structure. The lease premium is typically paid upfront as a one-time payment, and the amount can vary depending on various factors such as the location, size, and type of mast, as well as the demand for mobile coverage in the area.

The lease premium is often negotiated as part of a lease agreement between the mast owner and the mobile network operator. In addition to the lease premium, the agreement may also include ongoing rental payments, which are typically paid monthly or annually.

The lease premium can be a significant source of income for landowners or mast owners, and the amount can vary widely depending on the terms of the lease agreement and the specific circumstances of the mast installation. It’s important to carefully consider all the terms of a lease agreement before agreeing to a lease premium or rental payment, as the terms of the agreement can have a significant impact on the long-term financial benefits of the lease.
In some instances lease premium and lump sum payments can be used instead of an annual rental payment. In particular, third-party investors often look to secure rental income streams using lump sum premium payments.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”How do we charge? / What are our fees?” open=”off” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]Every site is unique, and our fees are tailored accordingly. Before we can provide an accurate breakdown of costs, we need to review the lease and any other relevant paperwork to understand the specifics of the case. Our Terms of Business are structured on a per-job basis, meaning each instruction has its own agreement that clearly outlines how our fees apply to that particular instruction. In most cases, we operate on a no-win, no-fee basis, ensuring that our clients only pay if we achieve a successful outcome. Additionally, our fees are designed to be incentivised, meaning that if we secure a higher rent or recover any backdated payments on behalf of our client, we receive a one-off payment or a small percentage of the amount gained. Since our fees are determined on a case-by-case basis, we can only provide precise details after reviewing all relevant documentation and having an initial consultation with the potential client.[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”How do I oppose a phone mast on my land?” _builder_version=”4.22.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]If you do not currently have a mobile Phone Mast on your land it is important that you contact a Phone Mast agent as soon as you have received any correspondence from the operator. It is not recommended that you allow the operator on the site to carry out any surveys or engage in any dialogue as this could prejudice your position. It should be noted that once an operator has surveyed the site and is able to demonstrate the site is buildable, they will be one step closer to being able to legally force an agreement on you and install a mast on your land or property. There are a number of factors that can prevent a mobile Phone Mast being installed on your land or property, but these need to be argued effectively in line with the current legislation. Many landowners are now opposing mobile phone masts because the rental income is not worth the burden or inconvenience of having the mast on site. Furthermore, you could: Review local regulations: Research the local zoning and regulatory laws in your area to determine if there are any restrictions on the installation of mobile phone masts. If there are, you may be able to use these regulations to oppose the installation. Gather community support: If other people in your community share your concerns, consider gathering support from them and creating a petition or writing letters to local officials or the mobile network operator. Contact local officials: Contact your local local council or planning authority to express your concerns and ask for their support in opposing the installation of the mobile Phone Mast. If you already have a mobile Phone Mast on your land or property, we recommend you get an agent to review the lease agreement to see if there are any clauses to allow them to terminate. Normally, in all circumstances you need to take legal action to remove an operator from site and consult with a lawyer who specialises in telecommunications law who would need to work alongside your Phone Mast advice company to determine your options and oversee the removal of the Phone Mast. It’s important to remember that opposing a mobile Phone Mast on your land can be a complex and challenging process, and the outcome may not always be in your favour. However, by taking these steps, you can make sure that your concerns are heard and considered.[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”What is a phone mast?” _builder_version=”4.22.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]Ever ask yourself, “What is a Phone Mast?“. A Phone Mast can have various different names, for example, Phone Mast, mobile Phone Mast site, mobile base station, or radio tower. Phone masts are typically made from galvanised steel and are required to provide signals to and from mobile devices such as phones, computers and tablets. A Phone Mast transmits and receives signals normally via antennae systems, microwave dishes and other electronic communications equipment, which can include cabins, cabinets, feeder cables, racks, RRUs (Remote Radio Units), fibre optic cables and specific hardware and software needed to allow the current UK licenced mobile phone operators to provide 2G, 3G, 4G and 5G signals to their customers. The geographic area that a Phone Mast provides coverage to is called a cell. These cells then connect into what is called a cellular network. Phone masts generally have a life span of around 30 years and are subject to annual health and safety checks, so they are maintained properly and safe to climb. Below, we explain what a Phone Mast is and describe the several types of phone masts.[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”What is phone mast rent?” _builder_version=”4.24.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

Phone Mast rent refers to the monetary compensation paid by a telecoms operator or a third-party investor to a landlord or property owner for the use of their land or property to host a mobile Phone Mast.

This rent is typically agreed upon in a lease agreement between the landlord (lessor) and the operator or investor (lessee). The amount of Phone Mast rent can vary depending on factors such as the location, size, and type of mast, as well as the prevailing market conditions and demand for mobile coverage in the area.

Phone Mast rent represents a source of income for landlords, providing them with ongoing financial compensation for allowing their land or property to be used for telecommunications infrastructure. The terms and conditions governing Phone Mast rent are typically outlined in the lease agreement, which may include provisions for rent escalation over time, maintenance responsibilities, access rights, and any restrictions or permissions regarding modifications to the mast or antenna equipment.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”What is a phone mast lease?” _builder_version=”4.24.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

A Phone Mast lease is a legal contract, with exclusive possession, over land or property for a period of time (fixed or periodic) in return for consideration, usually in the form of rent. This is not to be confused with a Phone Mast Lease Premium.

In this article, we explain more about what a Phone Mast lease is.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”What is the electronic communications code?” _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

The Electronic Communications Code (ECC), as reformed by the Digital Economy Act 2017, is the legal framework governing telecommunications operators’ rights to install and maintain equipment on land. Originally contained in Schedule 2 of the Telecommunications Act 1984, it was comprehensively reformed by the Digital Economy Act 2017, which inserted a new Code as Schedule 3A of the Communications Act 2003. The previous laws introduced a telecoms code which set out guidelines for the implementation and maintenance of Phone Mast sites and sought to resolve disputes between landlords and telecoms operators. The new Code will apply to telecoms sites where any loss is able to be compensated financially and where building the site is in the public interest.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”How can I remove a phone mast from my land or property?” _builder_version=”4.27.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

Removing a mobile Phone Mast from your land or property can be a complex process. It is necessary from the outset to get a Phone Mast advice agent for initial and ongoing advice. It’s important to follow the proper legal and regulatory procedures to ensure that you comply with all applicable laws and regulations.

Determine the cost of removing the mobile Phone Mast, including any associated costs such as site restoration, agent and legal fees, and factor this into your decision.

If required, hire a qualified contractor to safely remove the mobile Phone Mast and dispose of any associated equipment and materials.

Instruct an agent to monitor the removal process to ensure that it is completed safely and in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations.

You’ll need to be aware that most mobile Phone Mast installations have third party connections for power/electricity and broadband. These include companies such as Openreach and Virgin Media. Agreements may need to be terminated, and equipment and cabling that is in situ may also need to be removed.

It’s important to remember that removing a mobile Phone Mast from your land or property can be a complex and costly process, and it’s essential to carefully consider all the legal, financial, and practical implications before proceeding.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”Can I stop a phone mast operator from reducing my rent?” _builder_version=”4.22.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]Whether you can stop a mobile Phone Mast operator from reducing your rent depends on the terms of your lease agreement and whether your contract is still within the agreed term. If the lease agreement specifies a fixed rental amount, the mobile Phone Mast operator may not be able to unilaterally reduce your rent. However, if the lease agreement allows for rent adjustments based on certain factors such as changes in market conditions or demand for mobile coverage, the mobile Phone Mast operator may have the right to reduce your rent. If your contract has expired, the operator may be able to reduce your rent and take advantage of the new government legislation. Digital Economy Act 2017 – Electronic Communications Code. If you believe that the mobile Phone Mast operator is attempting to reduce your rent unfairly or in violation of the terms of the lease agreement, you may need to consult with a property agent or lawyer who specialises in property or telecommunications law to determine your options and protect your rights.[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”Are phone mast operators allowed to upgrade existing sites?” _builder_version=”4.22.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]Yes, Phone Mast operators are generally allowed to upgrade existing sites, subject to compliance with local regulations and any lease agreements in place. Upgrading an existing mobile Phone Mast can involve various changes, such as adding or replacing antennas, installing new equipment, or modifying the physical structure of the mast. These upgrades may be necessary to meet increasing demand for mobile coverage, to improve network reliability and performance, or to comply with new regulatory requirements. However, any upgrades to an existing mobile Phone Mast must comply with planning regulations, which may impose restrictions on the height, appearance, and other aspects of the mast. Additionally, any lease agreements in place between the mobile Phone Mast operator and the property owner must be reviewed to determine whether the upgrades are permitted and whether any modifications to the lease agreement are required.[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”Can the phone companies increase the height of the mast and add more equipment?” _builder_version=”4.22.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]In most cases, phone companies are allowed to increase the height of the mast and add more equipment, subject to compliance with local regulations and any lease agreements in place. Increasing the height of a mobile Phone Mast or adding more equipment can be necessary to meet increasing demand for mobile coverage, to improve network reliability and performance, or to comply with new regulatory requirements. However, any modifications to an existing mobile Phone Mast must comply with planning regulations, which may impose restrictions on the height, appearance, and other aspects of the mast. Additionally, any lease agreements in place between the mobile Phone Mast operator and the property owner must be reviewed to determine whether the modifications are permitted and whether any modifications to the lease agreement are required. If the modifications require changes to the lease agreement, the parties may need to negotiate new terms or seek legal advice.[/et_pb_accordion_item][et_pb_accordion_item title=”What happens when I sell my phone mast?” _builder_version=”4.24.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}” open=”off”]

Investors are willing to pay premium sums for the leasehold or freehold of your Phone Mast. When you sell your Phone Mast, investors offer a large lump sum, also known as a lease premium payment, replacing your annual rent. Selling your Phone Mast eliminates the need to navigate uncertain rents and ongoing lease renewals, providing financial security. The investor will then take over management duties, allowing you to benefit from your asset’s full value.

[/et_pb_accordion_item][/et_pb_accordion][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]

Matt Restall, the visionary founder of The Phone Mast Advice Company Ltd, is an unrivalled authority in providing expert advice on Phone Mast rents and contractual terms. With an impressive track record spanning over two decades, Matt has become a revered figure in the industry.

His most notable achievement came in the groundbreaking case of Compton Beauchamp Estates Limited vs CTIL (Cornerstone). In this landmark battle, Matt played a pivotal role in advising landlords in a case where a code operator sought to impose a Code agreement at drastically reduced terms through the Upper Tribunal (Lands Chamber). Thanks to Matt’s efforts, the tribunal dismissed the operator’s claim, delivering a resounding victory for all mobile Phone Mast landlords. This was a landmark victory that established operators with existing Landlord and Tenant Act 1954 protections cannot use the new Electronic Communications Code (which came into force in December 2017) to impose significantly reduced rents.

When Matt isn’t busy championing the rights of landlords, you’ll find him embarking on thrilling adventures with his kids, travelling or going to the gym.

He even ventured into running his own successful firm of Chartered Surveyors for over a decade.

Beyond his professional pursuits, Andrew finds joy in sports, particularly cricket and football. He is an unwavering supporter of Birmingham City Football Club, thanks to his father’s influence. We also advise you not to let mobile phone operators on your land or property until you have sought professional advice.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_3,1_3,1_3″ make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ custom_margin=”2em||2em||true|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ custom_padding=”|||” global_colors_info=”{}” custom_padding__hover=”|||”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Mast Sales” button_text=”Discover More” button_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI3OTQ5NSJ9fQ==@” blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _dynamic_attributes=”button_url,link_option_url” _module_preset=”a1521363-26b6-408c-98d5-cd1d5a751712″ min_height=”470px” max_height=”470px” link_option_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI3OTQ5NSJ9fQ==@” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Mobile Phone Mast leases are valuable assets for which investors will pay large sums of money for the freehold or leasehold of the land on which an operator’s mobile Phone Mast is located.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ custom_padding=”|||” global_colors_info=”{}” custom_padding__hover=”|||”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Redevelopment & Removals” button_text=”Discover More” button_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI3OTQ5MyJ9fQ==@” blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.23″ _dynamic_attributes=”button_url,link_option_url” _module_preset=”a1521363-26b6-408c-98d5-cd1d5a751712″ min_height=”470px” max_height=”470px” link_option_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI3OTQ5MyJ9fQ==@” global_colors_info=”{}”]

We can review existing mobile Phone Mast leases / agreements and provide the best advice on removing the operator if required.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ custom_padding=”|||” global_colors_info=”{}” custom_padding__hover=”|||”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Other Advisory Services” button_text=”Discover More” button_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI3OTQ5NyJ9fQ==@” blurb_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _dynamic_attributes=”button_url,link_option_url” _module_preset=”a1521363-26b6-408c-98d5-cd1d5a751712″ min_height=”470px” max_height=”470px” link_option_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI3OTQ5NyJ9fQ==@” global_colors_info=”{}”]

We offer a range of services, including advice on assignments. We can deal with negotiations on your behalf, engage with the operator and extract the best possible deal for you.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.23″ custom_margin=”2em||2em||true|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ custom_padding=”|||” global_colors_info=”{}” custom_padding__hover=”|||”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Lease Retrieval” button_text=”Discover More” button_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI3OTk2MiJ9fQ==@” blurb_icon=”||fa||400″ order_enable=”on” button_order=”10″ _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _dynamic_attributes=”button_url,link_option_url” _module_preset=”a1521363-26b6-408c-98d5-cd1d5a751712″ badge_text_font=”|700|||||||” badge_text_text_color=”gcid-a5e01c3a-717f-40df-b5f2-b1ba08b21a19″ badge_text_font_size=”6em” max_height=”470px” link_option_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjI3OTk2MiJ9fQ==@” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22,%22blurb_icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22background_color%22,%22background_color%22%93,%22gcid-a5e01c3a-717f-40df-b5f2-b1ba08b21a19%22:%91%22badge_text_text_color%22%93}”]
