[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ fullwidth=”on” admin_label=”Hero Section” _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_fullwidth_header title=”About The Phone Mast Advice Company Ltd” _builder_version=”4.27.5″ button_one_text_color_hover=”#edbb5f” button_two_text_color_hover=”#edbb5f” button_one_bg_color_hover=”rgba(0,0,0,0)” button_two_bg_color_hover=”rgba(0,0,0,0)” title_font_size__hover_enabled=”off|desktop”]

We are specialist telecoms surveyors established to help the huge number of unrepresented landlords across the UK. The mobile Phone Mast operators have made huge savings over a number of years by dealing directly with landlords who have not had professional advice and will agree below market rents. We want to put a stop to that. The Phone Mast Advice Company Ltd is a one-stop shop for landlords. We can advise on all telecoms matters. Whatever your issue, we can help.

[/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ admin_label=”01 Advanced Blurb” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”#f7f9fd” custom_padding=”100px||100px||true|false” locked=”off” collapsed=”on” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ text_font=”||||||||” header_3_text_color=”gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22header_text_color%22,%22header_3_text_color%22%93,%22gcid-213eb042-23f3-4c75-9db9-6ac4fa6a21d7%22:%91%22text_text_color%22%93,%22gcid-7a889ac8-02b0-42d3-ba1a-b88ba66c0c27%22:%91%22header_4_text_color%22%93}”]

How Our Phone Mast Advice Process Works

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”71f54dba-2f09-4d23-8c2e-df064370d3d9″ locked=”off”]

We are dedicated to all our clients, regardless of how many mobile Phone Mast sites they have. We aim to develop and maintain a friendly working relationship and ensure our clients feel well looked after and informed at every stage of the negotiations.

Our goal is to obtain the most favourable lease terms for the client, as well as the highest rent achievable for their mobile phone masts, ensuring the landlord is happy. At the same time, we aim to maintain a good landlord and tenant relationship.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.1″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-f1432252-1b9c-4972-a3d6-6d85161d05b9%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.1″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ text_font=”||||||||” header_3_text_color=”gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22header_text_color%22,%22header_3_text_color%22%93,%22gcid-213eb042-23f3-4c75-9db9-6ac4fa6a21d7%22:%91%22text_text_color%22%93,%22gcid-7a889ac8-02b0-42d3-ba1a-b88ba66c0c27%22:%91%22header_4_text_color%22%93}”]

Our Unique Process

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_3,1_3,1_3″ use_custom_gutter=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”40px||40px||true|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”First Contact” badge=”1.” blurb_icon=”||divi||400″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

When you contact us, we will chat through any issues you are currently having and establish how we may be able to help you.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Send Documents” badge=”2.” blurb_icon=”e||divi||400″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

We often require a copy of the agreement and any recent correspondence which we will review free of charge.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Information & Terms of Business” badge=”3.” blurb_icon=”||divi||400″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

We will then send you some information on the issue discussed and our terms of business, so you can see our fees.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_3,1_3,1_3″ use_custom_gutter=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” custom_padding=”40px||40px||true|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Allocate Surveyor” badge=”4.” blurb_icon=”||divi||400″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Once you instruct us, you will be allocated a dedicated surveyor who will deal with your case from start to finish and can be contacted for an update whenever you wish.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Leave it with us” badge=”5.” blurb_icon=”1||divi||400″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Your surveyor will make contact with the operator or their agent and take the matter out of your hands.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][difl_advanced_blurb title=”Results” badge=”6.” blurb_icon=”N||divi||400″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”6da1b318-7875-4f8a-8ff3-4093931fca33″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”]

You can be safe in the knowledge that we will negotiate the best possible deal for you and will take all the hassle away.

[/difl_advanced_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_image=”https://phonemastadvice.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/18.png” parallax=”on” min_height=”80vh” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ admin_label=”Statistics” _builder_version=”4.22.2″ background_color=”gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.20.4″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ custom_padding=”|||” global_colors_info=”{}” custom_padding__hover=”|||”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″]

How We Get The Job Done

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”71f54dba-2f09-4d23-8c2e-df064370d3d9″ locked=”off”]

For over 25 years, we have amassed a database of thousands of mobile Phone Mast deals across the UK which allows us to confidently negotiate higher rents and excellent lease/agreement terms for our landlords. This database ensures our negotiations are successful as we always have the comparable evidence to support our case.

Our success has not only benefited small landlords, who may only own a single mobile Phone Mast, but also large corporations such as supermarket chains and Local Authorities who often have extensive mobile Phone Mast portfolios. We are able to efficiently manage
such portfolios, ensuring we always achieve the best terms and highest rents in the marketplace. We guarantee rents are paid on time, allowing peace of mind for the client.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-a5e01c3a-717f-40df-b5f2-b1ba08b21a19″ min_height=”259.8px” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-a5e01c3a-717f-40df-b5f2-b1ba08b21a19%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.20.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_number_counter title=”Years of Experience” number=”25+” percent_sign=”off” _builder_version=”4.23.1″ _module_preset=”default” number_font=”|700|||||||” background_layout=”dark” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_number_counter][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.20.4″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_number_counter title=”Mobile Phone Mast Deals” number=”1,000+” percent_sign=”off” _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” number_font=”|700|||||||” background_layout=”dark” custom_margin=”0px||0px||true|false” custom_padding=”0px||0px||true|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_number_counter][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” header_text_align=”center” header_font_size=”4em” header_2_text_align=”center” header_2_font_size=”12em” text_orientation=”center” background_layout=”dark” header_font_size_tablet=”4em” header_font_size_phone=”2em” header_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone” header_2_font_size_tablet=”9em” header_2_font_size_phone=”6em” header_2_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone”]

Do You Need Help With a Phone Mast Lease?

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” text_line_height=”1em” text_orientation=”center” background_layout=”dark” text_line_height_tablet=”1em” text_line_height_phone=”1em” text_line_height_last_edited=”on|tablet”]

Specialist agents representing landlords, negotiating Phone Mast lease renewals with Vodafone, EE, Hutchison 3G (Three), O2, Airwave Solutions, Arqiva, On Tower, Cornerstone, Cellnex, and Wireless Infrastructure Group (WIG).

A well-structured telecoms lease can protect the value of your property for decades.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ admin_label=”Services” _builder_version=”4.23.1″ min_height=”646.2px” custom_margin=”|||” custom_padding=”60px|0px||0px|false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.5″ module_alignment=”center” min_height=”317.2px” custom_padding=”||0px|||” animation_style=”fade” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ custom_padding=”|||” global_colors_info=”{}” custom_padding__hover=”|||”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ header_2_font_size=”12em” header_2_font_size_tablet=”9em” header_2_font_size_phone=”6em” header_2_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone”]

Welcome to

The Phone Mast Advice Company Ltd – UK Landlord Specialists

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.1″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22color%22%93}”][/et_pb_divider][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-13f1c606-be05-4b7a-babe-8046e2113f3f%22:%91%22header_text_color%22%93,%22gcid-213eb042-23f3-4c75-9db9-6ac4fa6a21d7%22:%91%22text_text_color%22%93,%22gcid-7a889ac8-02b0-42d3-ba1a-b88ba66c0c27%22:%91%22header_4_text_color%22%93}”]

If you own land or property with a Phone Mast, telecom tower, rooftop antenna, or other telecommunications equipment, you need expert representation – not operator agents protecting their own interests. We help landlords secure fair rents, strong contracts, and long-term protection.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”191a735f-4790-4aa5-b3a6-6e9fea02f062″ header_2_font_size=”12em” header_2_font_size_tablet=”9em” header_2_font_size_phone=”6em” header_2_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone”]

How We Help Landlords

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_2,1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Clear Assessments & Strategy” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”657f9658-6b13-4e8b-b438-cb36d3830356″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-ea64fead-0eef-4748-8643-bcc5451477c3%22:%91%22image_icon_background_color%22%93}”]

We review your current agreement and any offers from operators, then explain your options in clear plain English.

[/et_pb_blurb][et_pb_blurb title=”Operator Engagement” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”657f9658-6b13-4e8b-b438-cb36d3830356″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-ea64fead-0eef-4748-8643-bcc5451477c3%22:%91%22image_icon_background_color%22%93}”]

We take over communication with the operator or their agents so you can focus on running your properties, not chasing rent increases or contract terms.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_2″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Market-Led Negotiations” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”657f9658-6b13-4e8b-b438-cb36d3830356″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-ea64fead-0eef-4748-8643-bcc5451477c3%22:%91%22image_icon_background_color%22%93}”]

Using our extensive database of comparable UK deals, we negotiate strong terms and fair rents, even when facing big telecom operators.

[/et_pb_blurb][et_pb_blurb title=” Full Support Until Completion” use_icon=”on” font_icon=”||fa||900″ _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”657f9658-6b13-4e8b-b438-cb36d3830356″ global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-82bc3aa3-97e9-4b68-ad42-b9f7d8e356e9%22:%91%22icon_color%22%93,%22gcid-ea64fead-0eef-4748-8643-bcc5451477c3%22:%91%22image_icon_background_color%22%93}”]

From initial strategy to final contract execution, we work with you and your solicitor to ensure your interests are fully protected.

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5″ locked=”off” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” background_color=”#12557B” custom_padding=”5vh|2vw|5vh|2vw|true|true” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”bd440461-a47f-4b44-986d-3dba84282a26″ header_2_font_size=”12em” header_2_font_size_tablet=”9em” header_2_font_size_phone=”6em” header_2_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone”]

Why You Need Specialist Advice

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”default” text_orientation=”center” background_layout=”dark” global_colors_info=”{}”]

Mobile Phone Mast leases and telecom agreements are complex and governed by both commercial law and the Electronic Communications Code (ECC) – the legal framework that affects rent, negotiation rights, and landlord protections.

• Without specialist advice, landlords commonly face:
• Under-market rent offers
• Unfavourable access & maintenance clauses
• Loss of redevelopment rights
• Confusing legal obligations under the ECC
• Poor outcomes from operator-led negotiations

We help you understand, challenge, and optimise every aspect of your telecom property agreements.

_builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”bd440461-a47f-4b44-986d-3dba84282a26″ header_2_font_size=”12em” header_2_font_size_tablet=”9em” header_2_font_size_phone=”6em” header_2_font_size_last_edited=”on|phone”]

We Instigated and Were Involved with The Most Famous Telecoms Test Case in History of UK

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” text_orientation=”center” background_layout=”dark” global_colors_info=”{}”]

To date, we are the first firm in the UK to have successfully fought back against operators and new legislation and kept rents at the same high levels. We were involved in the landmark case that established operators cannot use the new Code to bypass existing Landlord and Tenant Act 1954 protections, preventing significantly reduced terms from being imposed on landowners (see CTIL v Compton Beauchamp Estates [2022] UKSC 18). This is the most famous case in telecoms case law history, since the introduction of the Telecommunications Act 1984.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_button button_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wb3N0Iiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6Ijc1NDgifX0=@” button_text=”Learn How We Did It” button_alignment=”center” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _dynamic_attributes=”button_url” _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_button][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” custom_margin=”5vh||7vh||false|false” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][et_pb_testimonial author=”Richard Salmon” job_title=”Director” company_name=”Compton Beauchamp Estates” quote_icon_color=”#FFFFFF” quote_icon_background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” _builder_version=”4.27.4″ _module_preset=”default” body_font=”||on||||||” background_color=”RGBA(255,255,255,0)” text_orientation=”center” background_layout=”dark” custom_padding=”|0px||0px|false|true” global_colors_info=”{}”]

“Matt Restall has been managing the Compton Beauchamp Estates Phone Mast site portfolio since 2012. Matt was involved in instigating and advising on the famous court case Compton Beauchamp Estates v CTIL. We value the advice we have received from him over the last 12 years, and we would be happy to recommend his services to any landlords who have got Phone Mast sites.”

[/et_pb_testimonial][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” background_enable_color=”off” background_enable_image=”off” global_colors_info=”{%22gcid-22600b78-b82d-4bae-b782-f3cb617b66f5%22:%91%22background_color%22%93}”][et_pb_row _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_divider _builder_version=”4.22.2″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_divider][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.27.5″ _module_preset=”71f54dba-2f09-4d23-8c2e-df064370d3d9″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

We are specialist telecoms surveyors with over 25 years of experience advising landlords across the UK. Operators often approach landowners with proposals that favour their interests, not yours. Without professional guidance, many landlords end up with below-market rents and unfavourable lease terms.
